overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game, walking along a sunlit industrial waterfront dock. The player moves past abandoned vehicles, shipping containers, and industrial buildings with large holographic advertisements, briefly dipping into the water before continuing along the concrete pier toward distant gantries.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront dock with shipping containers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete dock, passing abandoned vehicles and industrial debris

notable_agents.action: abandoned rusty van with open doors parked beside the warehouse

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse with graffiti and corrugated metal siding
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the water edge
derelict brown cargo van with missing wheels and open side doors
large red and white industrial cargo vessel moored at the dock
tall chimneys emitting white steam against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit industrial dock with a corrugated metal warehouse on the left and red-white barriers separating the walkway from the water. An abandoned rusty van sits near the warehouse wall. As the camera advances, a large cargo ship comes into view on the right, docked at the pier with industrial smokestacks visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: water level view along dock pilings

events.description: camera drops to water level, transitioning from dock walking to water surface traversal

agents.ego_description: moving through shallow water at dock level, viewing the industrial structures from below the walkway

entered.detail: greenish harbor water with gentle ripples and reflections
wooden and metal support pillars extending into the water
silver bollard on the dock edge for securing vessels

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to water level, transitioning the perspective to a low-angle view moving through the harbor water. The docked cargo ship now dominates the right side at close range, while wooden pilings and the metal mooring hardware of the dock become prominent in the foreground. The industrial terminal buildings line the left side in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading dock with overhead gantries

events.description: camera rises back to eye level, resuming normal walking height on the dock

agents.ego_description: continuing along the concrete pier beneath large wooden loading structures, passing industrial tanks and warehouses

entered.detail: large wooden truss structures with overhead lighting rigs spanning the dock
cylindrical metal storage silos with ladders and piping
tall tower displaying glowing holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to normal walking height and continues along the concrete dock beneath massive wooden loading gantries that cast long shadows across the path. Industrial tanks and warehouses line the left side while the red-white barriers continue along the water edge. The segment progresses toward distant industrial structures and holographic towers under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit industrial waterfront that shifts from a high-angle walk to a low-level glide through the harbor before returning to the pier. It begins beside a corrugated metal warehouse and a rusty abandoned van, moving past red-white barriers as a large cargo ship and distant smokestacks emerge on the right. As the camera descends to water level, the perspective shifts to a low-angle view that glides through the harbor, bringing the hull of the cargo ship and wooden mooring pilings into sharp foreground focus. The scene then rises back to a walking height, passing beneath massive wooden loading gantries that cast long shadows across the concrete path. Finally, the camera advances past industrial tanks and warehouses toward distant holographic towers under the bright midday sun.
